word: G2027 - ἐποκέλλω - epokéllō - ep-ok-el'-lo - Run aground

sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἐποκέλλω

- Transliteration: Epokello

- Phonetic: ep-ok-el'-lo

- Definition:

1. to drive upon, strike against

a. to run a ship aground

- Origin: from G1909 and okello (to urge)

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G1909 and ὀκέλλω okellō (to urge); to drive upon the shore that is to beach a vessel: - run aground.
